content:
Fun little video that partially showcases the boss fights for D-Tide this week but mostly to show off the power of Pure Aequor rings even without their image relics in the game's hardest content
https://youtu.be/uCSnd-TgWXk

embeds.title: 400 D-Tide Pure Aequor on Caro Ring 1/18-2/1
embeds.description: The first in a series of showcases of how Pure Aequor can dominate the D-Tide leaderboards and get max reward score every two weeks no matter what ring.
